TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Pedro_Pablo_Kuczynski, title = Pedro_Pablo_Kuczynski, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pedro_Pablo_Kuczynski} }

S.FORM: Pedro Pablo Kuczynski ryax sa tay 3 nqu tay 10, Pedro Pablo Kuczynski, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1938) mrhuw Peru ta' misuw hya' ga Pedro Pablo Kuczynski, aring ryax tay 28 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Pedro Pablo Kuczynski ryax sa tay 3 nqu tay 10, Pedro Pablo Kuczynski, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1938) mrhuw Peru ta' misuw hya' ga Pedro Pablo Kuczynski, aring ryax tay 28 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: pe*ro paβlo kuʦ~ʨzjns~ɕki rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, pe*ro paβlo kuʦ~ʨzjns~ɕki, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw peru taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa pe*ro paβlo kuʦ~ʨzjns~ɕki, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
